name: James Edward Newell
title: Web Developer
tagline: Building thoughtful web experiences with clean code and clear design.
bio: I am a web developer with a background in education and a long-standing passion for building on the web. After years as a swimming teacher, I completed General Assembly's Web Development Immersive and have been growing my skills across the full stack ever since.

What drew me to development is the same thing that kept me in teaching: breaking down complex problems, refining solutions, and helping people achieve something tangible. I enjoy working in collaborative teams, shipping reliable software, and continuously learning as the industry evolves.
